inputs.user_query: Generate HIPAA audit logging detection rules and compliance metrics. My data sources are Wiz and Sentinel only.
Generate HIPAA audit logging detection rules and compliance metrics. My data sources are Wiz and Sentinel only.

outputs.plan_summary: Retrieve HIPAA detective controls, risks, and scenarios; resolve trend-focused metrics from Sentinel and Wiz; lookup MDL schemas and GoldStandardTable; run a relevance scoring pass; then generate and validate Sentinel SIEM rules and a medallion-based triage metrics plan.

dt_playbook_template_sections: Detection Rules (Sentinel) — Rule Logic, Test Cases, and TTP Mapping
Metrics & Dashboards — Trend Metrics and Calculation Logic

dt_semantic_questions.semantic_search: Provide detection scenarios for HIPAA audit logging failures and log pipeline issues: missing log sources, altered timestamps, dropped events, delayed forwarding to SIEM (Sentinel), or misconfigurations detected by CSPM (Wiz).
dt_semantic_questions.metrics_lookup: Which trend-oriented metrics in the registry from Wiz indicate number of cloud assets without audit logging enabled, count/trend of CSPM findings mapped to HIPAA audit logging controls, and change in posture over 30/90 days?

result.dt_plan_summary: Retrieve HIPAA detective controls, risks, and scenarios; resolve trend-focused metrics from Sentinel and Wiz; lookup MDL schemas and GoldStandardTable; run a relevance scoring pass; then generate and validate Sentinel SIEM rules and a medallion-based triage metrics plan.
